address.Address: #20, Avenue 5, Road No.8, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad, Telangana, India - 500 034.

school_address.streetAddress: #20, Avenue 5, Road No.8, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad, Telangana, India - 500 034.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: School has teachers like Ms Gitanjali who behaves like a tyrant,  créatine terror in a child. Don't what what the hype is all about of this school. Found other teachers like one hindi teacher, rough talking with my child, scolding so harshly

reviews.author: Atharv Bantia
reviews.review_body: The best school in Hyderabad for icse is this. The teacher are very polite and help us in every need in the school. Annual and sports day we enjoy a lot playing sports and practice dance. I am studying in this school from ukg pp1 now I am in 7 class. The most thing I like about the school is teachers, activities, classes, and most important are my friends which I made in this school.

reviews.author: Meenakshi Agarwal
reviews.review_body: Faculty is best, school management is awesome , very co operative

reviews.author: Radha Reddy
reviews.review_body: My kid is here from past three years, and  I want to share my experience, Class teacher is not having proper manners she will never encourage any thing it may be a sport or any thing. I was fully unsatisfied with the behavior of teacher and their management. Even we can't handle a bus driver also, I can simply say that the driver Mr.Babu behavious like a wild animal with the small innocent kids, soo many worst things we faced here Not suggestable for the sensitive people. All the staff are old aged and are not comfortable to mingle with these generation kids.

reviews.author: Punnu Takota
reviews.review_body: Senior in this school. From my 10 years of experience in this school, the only good thing I liked were the teachers and the friends I made. Everything else is like super messy and stuff. Hate the way they teach us and the pressure they create esp for us 10th graders regarding the boards. Not everyone can be a topper and not everyone can get 80/80.

reviews.author: Suhaib Zahrani
reviews.review_body: Phone number provided on website is wrong. Its Not working. For parents looking for new admission this is a basic information. Carelessness shown towards checking & providing such info is the basic need, which is ignored. First impression is really bad..double thumbs down 👎

reviews.author: Anti corruption Front
reviews.review_body:
मैं एलकेजी के लिए पूछताछ करने के लिए स्कूल गया था, वहां एक बुड्ढा मेंटल जैसा दिखने वाला सिक्योरिटी गार्ड खड़ा था और सभी अभिभावकों से गलत तरीके से पेस आ रहा था। किसी ने हमसे पूछा स्कूल ने छात्रों के लिए क्या क्या पेशकश की है, इसके बारे में बोलने से पहले उसने सभी को गेट से बाहर जाने को कहा , इससे पता चलता है कि वे कितने व्यावसायिक हैं  (सबसे खराब) इंटरैक्शन.

लेकिन एक  बात यह है कि यहां की फीस आसपास के अन्य स्कूलों की तुलना में थोड़ी कम है।
